description: Currently I work at Random Forest - a start-up which specializes in building dedicated machine learning models (natural language processing) which extract data from unstructured text. I'm also an IT tutor working for Sages where I provide trainings reagarding data science field.
description1:
Between October 2019 and November 2020 I've been working as a Machine Learning Engineer at Comarch in the area of telecommunication.

The main projects I was working on are:
projects1: Collaborating on an algorithm for matching devices existing in two separate datasets using text similarity metrics. The program was wrapped with desktop GUI (TKinter) and REST API (Flask & SQLAlchemy)

Elaborating an algorithm for clustering trouble tickets related to telecommunication network operation. Input parameters were: timestamp of the ticket, location and set of categorical features describing the ticket
Elaborating an algorithm for recommending actions which have to be taken based on alarms generated by a telecommunication network
Conducting a training for non-technical employees on the subject of Artificial Neural Networks
